natural_language_descriptions: Demos Network Node implementation: a single-process validator/node with RPC networking, consensus, storage, and optional feature modules.
Implements P2P networking, blockchain state, consensus (PoRBFT), and supporting services (MCP, metrics, TLSNotary, multichain, ZK features).
